creator: oleg.ginzburg@nevosoft.ru
text:
http://download.macromedia.com/pub/flashplayer/installers/current/9/install_flash_player_9.tar.gz has been update and CRC in distinfo for www/linux-flashplugin9 currenlty is wrong.
---
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> install_flash_player_9.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/flashplugin/9.0r152.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://download.macromedia.com/pub/flashplayer/installers/current/9/.
fetch: http://download.macromedia.com/pub/flashplayer/installers/current/9/install_flash_player_9.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 3056503, actual 3057882
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/flashplugin/9.0r152/.
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/flashplugin/9.0r152/install_flash_player_9.tar.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/flashplugin/9.0r152 and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/www/linux-flashplugin9.
---

How-To-Repeat: portsnap fetch update
cd /usr/ports/www/linux-flashplugin9 && make fetch
